steps.t: Búshatap can be found in Máttugard, south of Maergrind. You should travel to Búshatap.
Goblin bat-riders and bat-trainers can be found at Búshatap in Máttugard. You should defeat the goblins at Búshatap and destroy their training supplie…
Beastly sounds can be heard at Khorroz in Máttugard. You should explore Khorroz.
Beastly sounds can be heard at Khorroz in Máttugard. You should explore Khorroz.
Cave-beasts can be found at Khorroz in Máttugard. You should defeat cave-beasts and explore their domain.
Hetbrúda can be found near Búshatap in Máttugard. You should talk to Hetbrúda.
